info.title: Maeven Collections API
info.description: API spec with endpoints grouped by tags.

get.summary: List product variants by product ID
List items for a specific order

post.summary: Create GCash transaction with fee lookup

get.summary: List purchase orders with item totals
List estimates for a purchase order
Get estimated vs actual variance for a purchase order

get.description: Returns sales data (gross sales, net sales, discounts, items sold, order count) grouped by the chosen period. Defaults: daily → last 30 days, weekly → last 12 weeks, monthly → last 12 months, yearly → last 5 years.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End date (YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive). Required when period=custom.

get.description: Returns aggregated totals for a date range — useful for dashboard KPI cards.
Returns total collected amount and transaction count grouped by payment method for a given date range.
Returns the top N product variants ranked by total revenue within a date range.
Returns the cash reconciliation result for a branch and business date including opening cash, total sales, expected cash, actual cash, and shortage/overage.

put.summary: Upsert opening cash breakdown by branch/date
put.description: Creates opening cash if none exists for the branch/date, otherwise updates it. Returns 409 when the day is already closed.

post.summary: Encode closing cash breakdown and reconcile

UserUpdate.description: Fields that can be updated for a user. All properties are optional; provide only those to change.

password.description: Plain-text password; server will hash before saving.

items_total.description: Sum of quantity * unit_price across purchase order items

items_count.description: Number of items on the purchase order

other_cash_impact_amount.description: Net cash impact from other transactions (e.g., GCash cash_in/cash_out).

gcash_cash_in_total.description: Total positive cash impact from GCash cash-in transactions.

gcash_cash_out_total.description: Total cash removed through GCash cash-out transactions.

prepaid_load_total.description: Total prepaid load gross sales for the business date.
